calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73322426 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73322426 -maxdepth 7 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73322426 --event evt-petition-disposition\nrg --files data/cases/scotus/73322426 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg --files | rg '(^|/)record/|snapshots|73322426|statpack\\.(md|json)$' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find . -path './.git' -prune -o -type f \\( -name 'context.json' -o -name 'documents.json' -o -name 'questions-presented.txt' -o -name 'petition.txt' -o -name 'brief-in-opposition.txt' -o -name 'snapshot*.json' -o -name 'snapshot*.md' \\) -print | sort\nfind /tmp -maxdepth 5 -type f \\( -name 'context.json' -o -name 'documents.json' -o -name 'questions-presented.txt' -o -name 'petition.txt' -o -name 'brief-in-opposition.txt' -o -name 'snapshot*.json' -o

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases/scotus/73322426/record -maxdepth 4 -type f -print | sort
sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73322426/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml
sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73322426/record/context.json
sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73322426/record/documents/documents.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"wc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73322426/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json data/cases/scotus/73322426/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73322426/record/documents/petition.txt
sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73322426/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json
sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73322426/record/documents/questions-presented.txt
sed -n '1,900p' data/cases/scotus/73322426/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '700,1200p' data/cases/scotus/73322426/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|case law|legal search|search opinions/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"Modern discretionary|salience|Originating circuit|relist|Response requested|response requested|CVSG|fee class|Paid|Term\" metrics/statpack.md | head -120","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,190p' metrics/statpack.md\njq '{generated_at, scotus: (.scotus // .)}' metrics/statpack.json | head -300","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq -r '.sections[] | .name // .title // .label // (.key|tostring)' metrics/statpack.json\njq -r '.sections[] | select(((.name // .title // .label // .key // \"\")|tostring|test(\"term\";\"i\")))' metrics/statpack.json | head -500","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json\njq '.scotus_terms // .terms // .cert_terms // .term_stats // empty' metrics/statpack.json | head -600","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"two-way video\" \"Confrontation Clause\"",filed_before:"2026-07-17",order_by:"score desc",fields:["id","caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:10}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\ngit status --short --untracked-files=all\ntest -e data/cases/scotus/73322426/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z && find data/cases/scotus/73322426/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -print || true","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73322426/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"for f in data/cases/scotus/73322426/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z/*; do printf '%s\\n' \"$f\"; done\njq empty data/cases/scotus/73322426/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z/prediction.json data/cases/scotus/73322426/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z/tooling.json\nUV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workd
